name: ENDOCERVICAL POLYP

demographics.Histo: connective-tissue stalk with focal hyperplasia of glandular columnar epithelium ±

dominant_finding: may undergo cystic change → confusion with nabothian cyst
discriminating_features: typically slightly hyperechoic polyp compared with normal mucosa
may undergo cystic change → confusion with nabothian cyst
may be mobile at dynamic imaging with transducer pressure
± vascular stalk arising from endocervical mucosa (Doppler US)

general: typically slightly hyperechoic polyp compared with normal mucosa
may undergo cystic change → confusion with nabothian cyst
may be mobile at dynamic imaging with transducer pressure
± vascular stalk arising from endocervical mucosa (Doppler US)

clinical.Rx: management of prolapsed lesions tends to be more complicated ← more extensive blood supply
